0.title: Monitoring
0.description: Official data layers, integrated from the working group's institutions (ANA, CEMADEN, OCA, IBGE, INPE, Embrapa, CPTEC/INPE). Data on drought, climate, environment and socioeconomics.

1.title: Analysis
1.description: Multi-criteria model with configurable weights, aimed at prioritizing actions across the territory. Weights are collectively agreed upon by the GT-SAP.

2.title: Communication
2.description: Two automated PDF products: the Analytical Report, customizable by variable and scale (Brazil, state or municipality), and the Official Bulletin, with institutional validation.
